languages.text: Я повторял эти слова снова и снова, пока с ужасающей ясностью не осознал: проклятое дыхание Музеона, лишающее людей воли к жизни, не дает им услышать ни единого слова. Живая плоть была не в силах справиться с древним ужасом, порожденным обезумевшими железными мертвецами.

I said those words over and over, until it dawned on me with horrifying clarity that the Museion's cursed air was preventing the humans from hearing a single word as it sapped their will to live. Living flesh was no match for the ancient terror brought forth by the maddened dead creatures of metal.
languages.original_text: Я повторял эти слова снова и снова, пока с ужасающей ясностью не осознал: проклятое дыхание Музеона, лишающее людей воли к жизни, не дает им услышать ни единого слова. Живая плоть была не в силах справиться с древним ужасом, порожденным обезумевшими железными мертвецами.

traits.locale_text: I said those words over and over, until it dawned on me with horrifying clarity that the Museion's cursed breath was preventing people from hearing a single word as it sapped their will to live. Living flesh was no match for the ancient terror brought forth by the maddened dead creatures of iron.

I said those words over and over, until it dawned on me with horrifying clarity that the Museion's cursed breath was preventing people from hearing a single word as it sapped their will to live. Living flesh was no match for the ancient terror brought forth by the maddened dead creatures of iron.

I said those words over and over, until it dawned on me with horrifying clarity that the Museion's cursed air was preventing the humans from hearing a single word as it sapped their will to live. Living flesh was no match for the ancient terror brought forth by the maddened dead creatures of metal.

I said those words over and over, until it dawned on me with horrifying clarity that the Museion's cursed air was preventing the humans from hearing a single word as it sapped their will to live. Living flesh was no match for the ancient terror brought forth by the maddened dead creatures of metal.

languages.text: Pronuncié esas palabras una y otra vez, hasta que me quedó terriblemente claro que el aire maldito del Museion evitaba que los humanos oyeran nada mientras socavaba sus ganas de vivir. La carne viva no era rival para el terror ancestral despertado por las enloquecidas criaturas de metal.
languages.original_text: I said those words over and over, until it dawned on me with horrifying clarity that the Museion's cursed air was preventing the humans from hearing a single word as it sapped their will to live. Living flesh was no match for the ancient terror brought forth by the maddened dead creatures of metal.

traits.locale_text: Pronuncié esas palabras una y otra vez, hasta que me quedó terriblemente claro que el aire maldito del Museion evitaba que los humanos oyeran nada mientras socavaba sus ganas de vivir. La carne viva no era rival para el terror ancestral despertado por las enloquecidas criaturas de metal.

languages.text: Je répétais ces mots encore et encore, jusqu'à ce que je réalise avec une clarté effrayante que l'air maudit du Muséion empêchait les humains d'entendre le moindre mot tout en sapant toute volonté de vivre. La chair vivante ne faisait pas le poids face à l'horreur ancestrale qu'incarnaient ces créatures métalliques déchaînées.
languages.original_text: I said those words over and over, until it dawned on me with horrifying clarity that the Museion's cursed air was preventing the humans from hearing a single word as it sapped their will to live. Living flesh was no match for the ancient terror brought forth by the maddened dead creatures of metal.

traits.locale_text: Je répétais ces mots encore et encore, jusqu'à ce que je réalise avec une clarté effrayante que l'air maudit du Muséion empêchait les humains d'entendre le moindre mot tout en sapant toute volonté de vivre. La chair vivante ne faisait pas le poids face à l'horreur ancestrale qu'incarnaient ces créatures métalliques déchaînées.

languages.text: 我一遍又一遍地呼喊，直至认识到一个可怕的事实——陈列馆那受诅咒的空气，在消磨人类求生意志的同时，也让他们听不见只言片语。区区血肉之躯，根本无法匹敌那疯狂的金属亡灵所带来的远古恐惧。
languages.original_text: I said those words over and over, until it dawned on me with horrifying clarity that the Museion's cursed air was preventing the humans from hearing a single word as it sapped their will to live. Living flesh was no match for the ancient terror brought forth by the maddened dead creatures of metal.

traits.locale_text: 我一遍又一遍地呼喊，直至认识到一个可怕的事实——陈列馆那受诅咒的空气，在消磨人类求生意志的同时，也让他们听不见只言片语。区区血肉之躯，根本无法匹敌那疯狂的金属亡灵所带来的远古恐惧。

languages.text: Ich wiederhole diese Worte immer und immer wieder, bis ich mit erschreckender Klarheit erkannte, dass die Menschen in der verfluchten Luft des Museions kein Wort hören konnten, weil sie ihnen jeden Lebenswillen raubte. Lebendes Fleisch war dem uralten Schrecken nicht gewachsen, den die in den Wahnsinn getriebenen toten Metallkreaturen entfesselten.
languages.original_text: I said those words over and over, until it dawned on me with horrifying clarity that the Museion's cursed air was preventing the humans from hearing a single word as it sapped their will to live. Living flesh was no match for the ancient terror brought forth by the maddened dead creatures of metal.

traits.locale_text: Ich wiederhole diese Worte immer und immer wieder, bis ich mit erschreckender Klarheit erkannte, dass die Menschen in der verfluchten Luft des Museions kein Wort hören konnten, weil sie ihnen jeden Lebenswillen raubte. Lebendes Fleisch war dem uralten Schrecken nicht gewachsen, den die in den Wahnsinn getriebenen toten Metallkreaturen entfesselten.

languages.text: Bu kelimeleri tekrar tekrar söyledim. Ta ki Museion'un lanetli havasının, insanların yaşama iradelerini tüketirken tek bir kelime bile duymalarını engellediği gerçeği korkunç bir netlikle kafama dank edene kadar. Çıldırmış ölü metal yaratıkların getirdiği kadim dehşet karşısında canlı etin hiçbir şansı yoktu.
languages.original_text: I said those words over and over, until it dawned on me with horrifying clarity that the Museion's cursed air was preventing the humans from hearing a single word as it sapped their will to live. Living flesh was no match for the ancient terror brought forth by the maddened dead creatures of metal.

traits.locale_text: Bu kelimeleri tekrar tekrar söyledim. Ta ki Museion'un lanetli havasının, insanların yaşama iradelerini tüketirken tek bir kelime bile duymalarını engellediği gerçeği korkunç bir netlikle kafama dank edene kadar. Çıldırmış ölü metal yaratıkların getirdiği kadim dehşet karşısında canlı etin hiçbir şansı yoktu.

languages.text: 「この呪われた空気は、人間が生きていく意志を奪い、彼らの耳に届く言葉を一切聞かせない」と、私は恐怖に震えるほど鮮明に気づいた。生きている肉体は、狂った金属の死者の呼び出した古代の恐怖に勝てなかった。
languages.original_text: I said those words over and over, until it dawned on me with horrifying clarity that the Museion's cursed air was preventing the humans from hearing a single word as it sapped their will to live. Living flesh was no match for the ancient terror brought forth by the maddened dead creatures of metal.

traits.locale_text: 「この呪われた空気は、人間が生きていく意志を奪い、彼らの耳に届く言葉を一切聞かせない」と、私は恐怖に震えるほど鮮明に気づいた。生きている肉体は、狂った金属の死者の呼び出した古代の恐怖に勝てなかった。
